'''Koda's World''', sometimes referred to as '''Krin Koda''' after the [[Krin Koda|scout]] of the same name, was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], in the [[Tarin system]]. It is devoid of any advanced installations, as it is home to the primitive [[Tempestro]]. This temperate planet had warm, moist, breathable air.

==History==
Thousands of years ago, the planet was struck by a meteor. The Tempestro were unprepared technologically for such an event and, thus, most died in the dust cloud produced by the collision. The survivors built the [[Tempestro temple]] to preserve their knowledge. The Tempestro then forgot about their past and their roots and became a primitive tribal society of hunter-gatherers.<ref name="TP" />

Around [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], [[Dhar Bullwin]] visited Koda's World, seeking power in the temple. He was following a group of [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|New Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] who had unknowingly guided him to the planet. Bullwin was destroyed by the power in the temple, and it was, too, afterward.<ref name="TP" />

==Flora and fauna==
[[File:KodasWorld-GG8p90.jpg|thumb|left|A swamp around 7 ABY, with a primate as well as a forest in the background]]
At the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Koda's World was a warm, lush planet with jungles, gigantic forests, stone mountains, and deep green seas. It featured an abundance of sky-high trees and dense underbrush. The ancient trees reached from hundreds normally, such as near the [[Tempestro temple]], to thousands of meters. Their fronds were roughly of the shape of a human hand, and, as expected, there was very little foliage near the surface. Sap also ran in many of these trees, leaving an odorous smell in the air. The planet also featured some swamps, where the vegetation was not as imposing as in the forests.<ref name="TP" />

The trees made this world, in fact, very similar to the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], being covered in shaggy, rust-colored bark and rising as columns from the surface. The planet can also be compared to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in some areas, for the ground in the taller forests blocks most of the light. Stone mountains, oceans, and seas can also be found. The planet teemed with life, from insects to large mammals and reptiles such as the [[Garagon/Legends|Garagon]].<ref name="TP" />

==Installations and civilization==
Since the Tempestro were primitive, the only installations were at least one path through the forest, leading to the temple, the temple complex, and their own settlements.<ref name="TP" />
